features.name: Wallet Connection
features.description: Connects to Aptos wallets (Petra, etc.) and Bitcoin wallets.

ui_components.name: ConnectWalletButton
ui_components.description: Button to trigger wallet connection modal.

ui_components.name: WalletAuthModal
ui_components.description: Modal for selecting wallet and signing authentication message.

features.name: Memory Creation
features.description: Allows users to upload memories (images/videos) with metadata.

ui_components.name: MemoryUploadModal
ui_components.description: Form for uploading memory files and details.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Displays user stats, memory timeline, and quick actions.

ui_components.name: StatsCards
ui_components.description: Cards showing memory count and wallet balances.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Handles user sign-in and session management.
